line_map.line: Oo-oo-moon! Oo-oo-moon! Look at the moon!
Short oo — look! One team, two sounds!
Look at the moon! Where is the moon? Up on the roof!
Star can see the moon. Cool is the moon!
Sheep is on the roof too.
The moon is at the school. Look at the moon and the school!
What is on the roof?! POTATO! Look at the moon. Goodnight, moon.
